title: Hub Authority Reconciliation

hub_official_authority.description: Stage184 Page07 Release Seal is treated as the latest confirmed hub official authority known to this roadmap branch.
evidence: PR #54 officialized Stage184 Page07 Release Seal
PR #55 upgraded GPT preflight workflow authority
PR #56 defines Page08~Page17 roadmap authority as planning/design authority

Page08_Page17.scope: Commercial Absorption & Writer Studio Evolution Roadmap

reconciliation_rules: Local-known evidence must not be promoted to hub-official authority without branch, PR, Actions, merge, tag or release closure evidence.
Planning authority must not be treated as release seal authority.
Stage186~190 may establish Page08 implementation authority but cannot close Stage185 hub authority.
Page09 cannot begin until Page08 seal and local GitNexus or approved fallback evidence are present.
